title: One Kill - One Message
description: A simple client-side mod that automatically sends a random phrase from your list to chat after you kill a player.
body: [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) # One Kill - One Message A simple client-side mod for Fabric that automatically sends a random phrase from your list to chat after you kill a player. - Add, edit, and delete phrases via GUI - A random phrase is sent after each kill - Unlimited number of phrases - Enable/disable the mod via GUI - Config: `./config/Onekill-OneMessage.json` - Fully client-side, **no server installation required**
